message:
fix(clippy): Eliminate all remaining clippy warnings

Fixes across multiple files to achieve zero clippy warnings with pedantic lints:

- color.rs: Remove unfulfilled lint expectation, fix collapsible if
- box.rs, columns.rs, json.rs, panel.rs, progress.rs, tree.rs: Add
  feature-gate attributes for expect lints
- markup/mod.rs: Fix collapsible if statements, add map_or conversions
- progress.rs: Restructure match arms, fix borrowing patterns
- segment.rs: Fix collapsible if statements
- style.rs: Fix items_after_statements, format append patterns
- console.rs: Remove unused import
- rule.rs: Clean up feature gates

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -54,7 +54,10 @@ pub struct BoxChars {
 impl BoxChars {
     /// Create a new box from character arrays.
     #[must_use]
-    #[expect(clippy::too_many_arguments, reason = "struct constructor needs all fields")]
+    #[expect(
+        clippy::too_many_arguments,
+        reason = "struct constructor needs all fields"
+    )]
     pub const fn new(
         top: [char; 4],
         head: [char; 4],
